Tests the behavior of the modulus operator with a negative divisor in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion statement that checks a mathematical condition. It uses the `assert` function to verify that the result of the expression `100 % -3` is greater than 0. The expression `100 % -3` calculates the remainder of dividing 100 by -3. The purpose of this code is to ensure that the result of this modulus operation is positive, which may be part of a larger test suite or validation process.
